LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HOOCHIES LLC'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD( CHRIS PICONE). THE COURT HEARD THIS MOTION IN-CAMERA AT THE JUDGE'S CHAMBER WITH MR PICONE MOVING PARTY PRESENT. MR.MOLINA WHO APPEARED THRU COURT CALL DID NOT PURSUE HIS OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION. HENCE, IT WAS ONLY MR. PICONE PRESENT DURING THE IN-CAMERA SESSION. AFTER CONSIDERING ALL FACTS AND CIRCUMSTANCES THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS DEFENDANT (HOOCHIES) COUNSEL , ON CONDITION THAT COUNSEL SHOULD CONTINUE THE SCHEDULED HEARING ON SEPT. 28, 2005 AT DEPT. 218. THE COURT ORDERED THE RECORDS OF THIS IN-CAMERA SESSION SEALED UNDER ORDER BY THIS COURT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/JU)BELDON YEE # 2647
